title: NHS: Tips on preparing for exams
summary: Covers realistic revision planning, finding a revision style that suits you, and asking for support when pressure builds.

title: Childline: Exam stress and pressure
summary: Explains signs of exam stress, how to talk about pressure, and where to find more help if stress is getting too much.

title: YoungMinds: Exam stress
summary: Young-person-focused guide to coping with exam pressure and knowing when to reach out for help.

title: Samaritans: Exam stress coping strategies
summary: School-focused coping strategies material that can help students recognise stress and think about healthier ways to respond.
